## Summary

A concise description of the feature and what problem it solves.

## Actors affected

Which users are affected: Buyer / Supplier / Admin / All

## Proposed behaviour

Describe what the feature should do. Include UI sketches or API shapes if helpful.

- [ ]
- [ ]
- [ ]

## Out of scope

What this issue explicitly does not include.

## Suggested branch name

`feature/<this-issue-number>-short-description`
